item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday Celerydump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
well i'm stumped
chefs kiss
can confrm
i like movie theater popcorn. and fries
ain't that the truth
it's the same picture
salamanders are pretty cool. we have some in my area and sometimes see them when it's rainy
now wait just a minute
i don't remember that episode
i'm in
the natives were invaded by the white man
as is tradition
yes
i don't like this meme
i try extra hard because imgur is so cool and nice and attractive
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: August is the hardest month
item.description: My sister is an astronaut Gliding through the Milky Way, trailing her fingers through stardust. Gazing at the cosmos, I haven’t heard her voice in four years. My sister is traveling the country, taking pictures, picking plants, making scrapbooks page after page. I can’t wait to see them when she returns. My sister is on vacation, at the beach her favorite place. Soaking in the sun and tanning with a drink in her hand and peaceful look on her face. Her hair is wet with the ocean water, and I wish I could see her like that. My sister is dead, she isn’t alive anymore. She hasn’t been alive for four years. She’s not here, she won’t be coming back home, but my mind can’t bear the thought of her not existing, so my brain lies to my heart. It whispers tales of the Adventures of Liz, fantastic stories of the places she’s been, places she’s going, because she can’t possibly be gone. She can’t have left without saying goodbye. But she did, and now…? My sister is an astronaut.
item.dc:creator: NIMHspal

item.title: Deviousness Day 126
item.description:
Welcome to another Deviousness week! I am working no a bunch this week for the deviousness server and will be making a server announcement with the changes aiming for friday yay! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! Right now we have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2 friday nights. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I feel like people said this is ai generated?
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. They will also be running a fun new area soon with a monthly photo contest voted on by the community where the winner will receive a custom digital artwork of their photo the following week by Cammyjay! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/gallery/fFYOR2B
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Bottom shelf memes: bored games edition
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You should actually watch the video https://youtu.be/rvUzuK0ygI4?si=hiTNEAhLcB-b2P-W
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.description: It baffles me that in today's day and age, in the United States, someone can be so hateful and ignorant.
item.dc:creator: DogGuyInCatWorld

item.title: Alas, poor Yorick... wait, he's billed higher than me?!
item.description:
So I've seen this image posted before, but yesterday @Degarafarat made a comment on it that caused me to consider something that had never occurred to me previously.
(Sorry for the lousy cropping) So, does anyone know if SAG (or whomever writes the billing rules) has a caveat for a situation such as this? How to cite/reference/credit bequeathed, named, human remains in a production on stage/on camera? There must be something out there, right?
item.dc:creator: Yakeshinu
